preferred_name: broadband cavitation acceleration per g rms

preferred_name_ml.en: broadband cavitation acceleration per g rms

definition: root mean square of the oscillation signal due to cavitation within a defined frequency range, expressed as acceleration in units of the acceleration of gravity g

definition_ml.en: root mean square of the oscillation signal due to cavitation within a defined frequency range, expressed as acceleration in units of the acceleration of gravity g
definition_ml.de: Effektivwert des Beschleunigungssignals der Schwingung, hervorgerufen durch Kavitation, innerhalb eines definierten Frequenzbereichs, ausgedrückt als Beschleunigungswert in Einheiten der Erdbeschleunigung g

note: The frequency range is regularly defined by the user.

note_ml.en: The frequency range is regularly defined by the user.
note_ml.de: Der Frequenzbereich wird in der Regel vom Nutzer festgelegt.

raw_properties.MDC_P004.en: broadband cavitation acceleration per g rms

raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: The frequency range is regularly defined by the user.
